description: Karaite betrothal deed. Dated 1 Kislev 5507 AM (1746 CE). Location: Cairo. The deed contains the common stipulations found in this period: the groom is taking upon himself not to marry another wife for 10 years unless his wife is childless. Also not to travel outside of Egypt-except for Jerusalem for 10 years. Signed by the scribe and witness Eliyahu Rofe aka Ṣaʿīr and another witness Shelomo b. Moshe Rofe aka Ṣaʿīr. The marital payments are listed as: 25 kesif + 775 medin + 100 medin + 400 medin. There is an draft of the same document below the signatures section. AA/MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
